name: Knowledge Base
description: Multi-source knowledge search (pgvector + LightRAG) — injects relevant documents and knowledge graph context before each turn

geminiApiKey.description: Gemini API key for embedding queries (required for pgvector)

postgresUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection string for the knowledge database

collections.description: Collection names to search in the knowledge_vectors table

pgvectorEnabled.description: Enable/disable pgvector search (default: true if geminiApiKey set)

lightragQueryMode.description: LightRAG query mode: naive, local, global, hybrid (default: hybrid)

lightragEnabled.description: Enable/disable LightRAG search (default: true if lightragUrl set)

geminiApiKey.label: Gemini API Key
geminiApiKey.help: Use ${GEMINI_API_KEY} for env var substitution. Required for pgvector search.

collections.label: Collections to search
collections.help: Collection names in the knowledge_vectors table (e.g. knowledge_olivier)

enabled.label: Auto-inject knowledge
enabled.help: Automatically search and inject relevant documents before each agent turn
